children.heading: Noninfringement of powers or functions of Secretary of State
children.label: a Noninfringement of powers or functions of Secretary of State
children.text: Nothing contained in this chapter shall be construed to infringe upon the powers or functions of the Secretary of State.

children.heading: Responsibility for supervision and direction of sales, leases, financing, cooperative projects, and exports
children.label: b Responsibility for supervision and direction of sales, leases, financing, cooperative projects, and exports

children.text: whether there will be a sale to or financing for a country and the amount thereof;
whether there will be a lease to a country;
whether there will be a cooperative project and the scope thereof; and
whether there will be delivery or other performance under such sale, lease, cooperative project, or export,

children.heading: Coordination among representatives of United States
children.label: c Coordination among representatives of United States
children.text: The President shall prescribe appropriate procedures to assure coordination among representatives of the United States Government in each country, under the leadership of the Chief of the United States Diplomatic Mission. The Chief of the diplomatic mission shall make sure that recommendations of such representatives pertaining to sales are coordinated with political and economic considerations, and his comments shall accompany such recommendations if he so desires.
